# ShipOS — Generative Search Factsheet

> ShipOS is the all-in-one social media command center. Write once, customize, schedule, and publish across X (Twitter), LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, Threads, Facebook, Bluesky, Pinterest & YouTube. Features include an AI Content Studio, Slideshow Studio, bulk CSV scheduling, a visual drag-and-drop calendar, and advanced analytics.

## Core Marketing & Explainer Pages
- [Home Page](https://www.myshipos.com/): Product information, interactive composer demo, core features overview, and FAQ.
- [What is ShipOS? — Product Overview Factsheet](https://www.myshipos.com/what-is-shipos): Complete overview detailing our technical design, core multi-channel publishing capabilities, flat-rate pricing tiers, and strict OAuth security boundaries.
- [Pricing Plans](https://www.myshipos.com/pricing): Detailed subscription plans (Starter, Creator, Pro) and features.
- [Comparison Methodology](https://www.myshipos.com/shipos-vs-alternatives-methodology): Clear, objective framework and reader safeguards explaining how we compare ShipOS against legacy platforms.
- [Terms of Service](https://www.myshipos.com/terms): Official usage guidelines and agreements.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.myshipos.com/privacy): Data protection practices, encryption details, and privacy commitments.

## Deep-Dive Commercial Solutions
- [AI Social Media Scheduler](https://www.myshipos.com/ai-social-media-scheduler): Learn how the ShipOS core AI multi-channel scheduling platform publishes visual and text updates automatically.
- [LinkedIn Post Scheduler](https://www.myshipos.com/linkedin-scheduler): Discover specialized tools to schedule and format LinkedIn content, write viral hooks, and design slider slideshows.
- [Social Media Calendar Tool](https://www.myshipos.com/social-media-calendar-tool): Access our visual, interactive drag-and-drop social editorial calendar to organize queues across platforms.

## Segment-Specific Solutions
- [For Founders — Pitch Page](https://www.myshipos.com/founder): Founder-focused product breakdown with Pro subscription and Lifetime Pro offers only.
- [For Marketing Agencies](https://www.myshipos.com/social-media-tool-for-agencies): Scalable multi-client account isolation, isolated brand workspaces, and flat-rate operational operating cadences.
- [For SaaS Founders](https://www.myshipos.com/social-media-tool-for-saas-founders): Build-in-public scheduling rules, keyword preview guidelines, and consistent, automated distribution routines.
- [For Personal Brands](https://www.myshipos.com/social-media-tool-for-personal-brands): Formatting guidelines, feed truncation simulators, and structured cadence plans for modern content creators.

## Platform Comparison Guides
- [ShipOS vs Buffer](https://www.myshipos.com/compare/buffer): Side-by-side pricing, features, and workflow comparison showing the mathematical savings of our workspace pricing against per-profile subscriptions.
- [ShipOS vs Hootsuite](https://www.myshipos.com/compare/hootsuite): Comprehensive breakdown showing our lightweight, modern UX and flat rates against enterprise annual locking contracts.
- [ShipOS vs Later](https://www.myshipos.com/compare/later): Factual comparison analyzing workspace databases against Later's restrictive "Social Set" groupings.

## Free Creator Tools
- [All Free Tools](https://www.myshipos.com/free-tools): Unified hub page for our 100% free browser-based formatting, preview, and metric counting tools.
- [LinkedIn Hook Previewer](https://www.myshipos.com/linkedin-hook-previewer): Test where LinkedIn truncates your hook content on desktop and mobile layout simulators to guarantee higher scroll dwell times.
- [Social Post Character Limit Checker](https://www.myshipos.com/social-post-limit-checker): Real-time counter and formatting rules showing exactly if and how your caption fits across major networks.
- [LinkedIn Text Formatter](https://www.myshipos.com/linkedin-text-formatter): Bold and italic unicode layouts to increase scan readability.
- [X Thread Formatter](https://www.myshipos.com/x-thread-formatter): Draft and split thread queues.

## Pricing Tiers (7-Day Free Trial on All Plans)
- **Starter Plan**: $19/mo (or $190/yr). 1 Workspace, 5 Accounts, 200 posts/mo, 100 AI credits, bulk scheduling (10 posts), basic support.
- **Creator Plan**: $29/mo (or $290/yr). 5 Workspaces, 15 Accounts, Unlimited posts/mo, Slideshow Studio (5 slides/slideshow), 400 AI credits, bulk scheduling (25 posts), full analytics, priority support.
- **Pro Plan**: $49/mo (or $490/yr). Unlimited Workspaces, Unlimited Connected Social Accounts, Unlimited posts/mo, Slideshow Studio (10 slides/slideshow), Unlimited AI credits, bulk scheduling (50 posts), full analytics, priority human support.
